title: Cologne, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cologne, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cologne is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 1,085,000. The cathedral city on the Rhine, a media and cultural hub with a lively arts scene, Carnival traditions, and a welcoming spirit.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
